title: Marco Polo
director: Hugo Fregonese, Richard McNamara, Piero Pierotti
writer: Piero Pierotti, Oreste Biancoli, Duccio Tessari
actors: Rory Calhoun, Yôko Tani, Robert Hundar
plot: Italian explorer rescues the daughter of the Mongol leader Kublai Khan, meets a hermit who has invented gunpowder and builds a cannon.
